---
title: "Dr. Adam William Thorburn Steer"
---

## Dr. Adam William Thorburn Steer

**Dates:** (b. Jamaica 1862/3)

### Description

husband of [[person:1365]Katharine (Yonge) Steer], eldest daughter of the Rev. Duke Yonge

### Biography

He remarried after her early death.

### Letters

- Letter from March 17th [1895]
- Letter from Sept 18th [1889]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
